description: Token lifecycle tracking for workspace credentials

tokens.name: openai-codex:default
tokens.description: OpenAI Codex OAuth token for Codex CLI and runtime
tokens.notes: Live runtime auth verified healthy on 2026-03-30. Runtime expires 2026-04-08. Refresh via openclaw models auth login --provider openai-codex --set-default when needed.
